fragility_points: Overnight crypto risk-off move before settlement.
Sharp intraminute drop into the exact noon ET window.
Small but nonzero timestamp/candle interpretation confusion.
key_assumptions: ETH remains comfortably above 2200 into the April 17 noon ET settlement minute.
No major macro or crypto-specific shock forces a sharp drawdown before settlement.
Binance noon-ET candle interpretation remains operationally straightforward.
main_logical_chain: The contract resolves on Binance ETH/USDT for a specific 12:00 ET one-minute candle close above 2200.
Current Binance spot and recent klines place ETH materially above 2200, so baseline direction favors Yes.
Because the contract is narrow and time-specific, the residual risk is concentrated in short-horizon path risk rather than broad directional thesis.
That supports a high Yes probability, but slightly below the market's ~94.5%-95% confidence.
main_thesis: ETH is likely to settle above 2200 on Binance at the April 17 noon ET minute, but the market is slightly overconfident because narrow settlement-window path risk remains underpriced.
quote_anchors: The strongest disconfirming consideration is simple: this is a one-minute, noon-ET settlement contract, not a broad daily-close question.
The governing source of truth is Binance ETH/USDT, specifically the 1-minute candle for 12:00 ET on April 17.
source_quality_view: High-quality primary evidence from Binance exchange data, medium independence overall, low-to-medium source-of-truth ambiguity due mainly to narrow candle-timing interpretation.
strongest_disconfirmers: This is a one-minute, noon-ET settlement contract, so a sharp selloff in the exact window can still resolve No.
Extreme market pricing may underweight residual timing and path risk.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance spot price during the run was about 2353.68, roughly 154 points above the threshold.
Recent Binance 1h and 1m klines were centered in the low-to-mid 2300s rather than near 2200.
Contract wording is clear on venue, pair, threshold, and noon ET timing.
timing_relevance: Very high: only the Binance ETH/USDT one-minute candle at 12:00 ET on April 17 matters for settlement.
unresolved_ambiguities: Practical retrieval/display convention for the exact noon ET candle remains slightly fragile in edge-case discussion.
No strong independent catalyst check was obtained beyond direct exchange data and docs.
what_would_change_view: I would cut the estimate materially if ETH fell toward 2250 or below ahead of settlement, if a broad crypto selloff accelerated, or if credible evidence showed more contract-timing ambiguity than currently appears.
